role_summary: Configuration template defining default runtime parameters for the wikifi system, primarily governing LLM provider integration, model selection, and processing constraints for automated source code analysis and knowledge extraction.
extracted_finding: The system implements an AI-driven code introspection pipeline that relies on configurable LLM parameters to balance analysis depth, processing speed, and resource efficiency. Key domain concepts include stage-based code analysis (Stage 1 introspection), adaptive reasoning modes (high/medium/low/thinking toggles for models like Qwen3 and DeepSeek-R1), and input filtering rules (max file size and min content length) to prevent inefficient LLM usage on trivial files. Business rules dictate that system defaults are centralized in wikifi/config.py, LLM timeouts are optimized for high-compute reasoning models, and configuration values are strictly optional to maintain fallback behavior. Functional responsibilities encompass managing API connectivity, enforcing content validation thresholds, and regulating the reasoning intensity of the extraction process to ensure consistent output quality.
